history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young woman with dark hair and headphones is playing an electronic drum set. She is wearing a white collared shirt and is captured mid-motion, holding drumsticks. The drum set appears to be black with white pads. Behind her, a black backdrop features a white logo that reads "XUИ" in a stylized font. To the right of the backdrop, a dark curtain with a pattern of white stars is visible. The lighting is somewhat dim, with the primary light source illuminating the woman and the drum set, creating a focused and dynamic atmosphere. The overall mood is energetic and focused, suggesting a musical performance or practice session. The color palette is dominated by dark tones with accents of white and the natural skin tones of the woman.
